name: LiveKit Real-Time Communication API
description: LiveKit is an open-source WebRTC platform for building real-time voice, video, and data applications. Use this API to manage rooms, participants, tracks, recording/streaming via egress, external media ingress, and SIP telephony integration for AI agents and communication workflows.

capabilities.name: rooms_create
capabilities.description: Create a new room with configurable settings including timeout, max participants, metadata, and egress options.

capabilities.name: rooms_list
capabilities.description: List all active rooms, optionally filtered by room names.

capabilities.name: rooms_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a room and disconnect all participants currently in it.

capabilities.name: rooms_metadata_update
capabilities.description: Update the metadata of an active room and broadcast the change to all participants.

capabilities.name: participants_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all participants currently in a specific room.

capabilities.name: participants_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific participant by identity in a room.

capabilities.name: participants_remove
capabilities.description: Remove a participant from a room, disconnecting them immediately.

capabilities.name: participants_update
capabilities.description: Update a participant's metadata, permissions, or display name in a room.

capabilities.name: tracks_mute
capabilities.description: Mute or unmute a published audio or video track for a participant in a room.

capabilities.name: tracks_subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Subscribe or unsubscribe a participant from specific tracks in a room.

capabilities.name: data_send
capabilities.description: Send data packets to participants in a room via reliable or lossy transport.

capabilities.name: egress_room_composite_start
capabilities.description: Start recording or streaming an entire room as a composite video/audio output to file, stream, or segments.

capabilities.name: egress_track_composite_start
capabilities.description: Start recording specific audio and video tracks from a participant as a composite output.

capabilities.name: egress_track_start
capabilities.description: Start recording an individual track directly to a file or WebSocket.

capabilities.name: egress_web_start
capabilities.description: Start recording an arbitrary web page as video/audio output.

capabilities.name: egress_list
capabilities.description: List all active egress sessions, optionally filtered by room name.

capabilities.name: egress_stop
capabilities.description: Stop an active egress recording or streaming session.

capabilities.name: egress_layout_update
capabilities.description: Update the web layout of an active room composite egress session.

capabilities.name: sip_inbound_trunk_create
capabilities.description: Create an inbound SIP trunk for receiving phone calls into LiveKit rooms.

capabilities.name: sip_outbound_trunk_create
capabilities.description: Create an outbound SIP trunk for placing calls from LiveKit rooms to phone numbers.

capabilities.name: sip_inbound_trunks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured inbound SIP trunks.

capabilities.name: sip_outbound_trunks_list
capabilities.description: List all configured outbound SIP trunks.

capabilities.name: sip_trunk_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a SIP trunk (inbound or outbound) by its trunk ID.

capabilities.name: sip_dispatch_rule_create
capabilities.description: Create a dispatch rule to route incoming SIP calls to specific rooms or generate individual rooms per caller.

capabilities.name: sip_dispatch_rules_list
capabilities.description: List all configured SIP dispatch rules.

capabilities.name: sip_participant_create
capabilities.description: Initiate an outbound SIP/PSTN call and connect it as a participant in a LiveKit room.

capabilities.name: sip_participant_transfer
capabilities.description: Transfer an active SIP call participant to another phone number or SIP endpoint.
